chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1565 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on CMA No.7848/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For hearing of CMA No.6188/2024 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 02.12.2024 Mr. Muhammad Junaid Akram Malik, Advocate for the petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Per office note, the instant Constitution Petition is already fixed on 12.03.2025, learned counsel pleads urgency and submits that date given by the office is too longer, besides the FIR in question has been challaned, therefore, the instant Constitutional Petition. In view of the dicta laid down by Honourable Supreme Court in the case reported as PLD 2013 SC 401 has become infructuous. In such circumstances, he does not wish to press instant Constitutional Petition, therefore, submits by granting urgency application, it may be converted into an application for antedating the case and matter may be taken up in Court today for hearing. Order accordingly. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3&4. In view of above, instant Constitutional Petition being infructuous is hereby dismissed along with pending applications; however, the petitioners are at liberty to seek remedy before the trial Court where the case against them is pending adjudication. Judge Judge ARBROHI
